commandPalette.title: Command Palette
commandPalette.description: Search for a command to run...

settings.title: Settings

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.themeDescription: Choose your preferred theme or follow your system settings. Custom theme changes are applied only when you save.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred language for the application interface.

defaultBrowser.title: Default Browser
defaultBrowser.description: When set as default, Donut Browser will handle web links and allow you to choose which profile to use.

permissions.title: System Permissions
permissions.description: These permissions allow browsers launched from Donut Browser to access system resources. Each website will still ask for your permission individually.
permissions.microphoneDescription: Access to microphone for browser applications
permissions.cameraDescription: Access to camera for browser applications

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Configure Local API and MCP (Model Context Protocol) for integrating with external tools and AI assistants.

encryption.title: Sync Encryption
encryption.description: Set a password to enable E2E encrypted sync. If you lose this password, encrypted profiles cannot be recovered.
encryption.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
encryption.requiresProOrOwner: Profile encryption is available for Pro users and team owners.

commercial.title: Commercial License
commercial.trialActiveDescription: Commercial use is free during the trial period
commercial.trialExpiredDescription: Personal use remains free. Commercial use requires a license.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.clearCacheDescription: Clear all cached browser version data and refresh all browser versions from their sources. This will force a fresh download of version information for all browsers.

settings.disableAutoUpdatesDescription: Prevent the app from automatically checking and installing Donut Browser updates. Browser updates are not affected.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.emptyDescription: Create your first browser profile to get started.
profiles.noResultsDescription: No profiles match your search criteria.

synchronizer.stopLeader: Stop this profile and all its followers
synchronizer.wayfernOnly: Only Wayfern profiles can be synchronized
synchronizer.selectFollowersDesc: Choose profiles that will mirror the actions of the leader profile. Only stopped Wayfern profiles can be selected.
synchronizer.noFollowers: Select at least one follower profile
synchronizer.flakyTooltip: This profile has a different screen resolution than the leader. Page layouts may differ, causing clicks and interactions to hit the wrong elements.

profiles.ephemeralDescription: The browser is forced to write profile data into memory instead of disk. Data is deleted when the browser is closed.

bulkDelete.title: Delete Selected Profiles
bulkDelete.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete {{count}} profile(s) and all associated data.

delete.title: Delete Profile
delete.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the profile "{{profileName}}" and all its associated data.

createProfile.title: Create New Profile

antiDetect.title: Anti-Detect Browser
antiDetect.description: Choose a browser with anti-detection capabilities

proxy.title: Proxy / VPN
proxy.noProxiesAvailable: No proxies or VPNs available. Add one to route this profile's traffic.

version.fetchError: Failed to fetch browser versions. Please check your internet connection and try again.
version.latestNeedsDownload: Latest version ({{version}}) needs to be downloaded

createProfile.camoufoxWarning: Firefox (Camoufox) is maintained by a third-party organization. For production use, please use Chromium.
createProfile.platformUnavailable: {{browser}} is not available on your platform yet.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Profile
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this profile? This action cannot be undone.
deleteDialog.profilesDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the selected profiles? This action cannot be undone.

proxies.title: Proxies

management.description: Manage your proxy and VPN configurations for reuse across profiles
management.noneCreated: No proxies created yet. Create your first proxy using the button above.
management.syncCannotDisable: Sync cannot be disabled while this proxy is used by synced profiles
management.cannotDelete_one: Cannot delete: in use by {{count}} profile
management.cannotDelete_other: Cannot delete: in use by {{count}} profiles
management.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the proxy "{{name}}".

proxies.noProxiesDescription: Add a proxy to route browser traffic through it.

form.name: Name
form.ssCipherRequired: Cipher and password are required for Shadowsocks

dynamic.description: Dynamic proxy fetches connection details from a URL each time a profile is launched.
dynamic.formatTextHint: Expects text like: host:port:username:password or protocol://user:pass@host:port

exportDialog.title: Export Proxies
exportDialog.description: Export your proxy configurations to a file

importDialog.title: Import Proxies
importDialog.descDropzone: Import proxies from a JSON or TXT file
importDialog.descAmbiguous: Some proxies have ambiguous formats. Please select the correct format.
importDialog.noValidProxies: No valid proxies found in the file
importDialog.namePrefixHint: Proxies will be named "{{prefix}} Proxy 1", "{{prefix}} Proxy 2", etc.
importDialog.ambiguousIntro: The following proxies have an ambiguous format. Please select the correct interpretation for each.

groups.title: Groups
groups.noGroupDescription: Profiles without a group will appear in the "Default" group.
groups.noGroupsDescription: Create a group to organize your profiles.
groups.createDescription: Create a new group to organize your browser profiles.
groups.editDescription: Update the name of your group.
groups.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the group.
groups.whatToDoWithProfiles: What should happen to these profiles?
groups.deleteAlongWithGroup: Delete profiles along with the group
groups.noAssociatedProfiles: This group has no associated profiles.

mode.title: Profile Sync
mode.encryptedDescription: Encrypted before upload. Server never sees plaintext data.
mode.noPasswordWarning: E2E password not set. Please set a password in Settings.
mode.passwordRequired: E2E password not set. Please set a password in Settings first.

sync.title: Account
sync.description: Connect to a sync server to synchronize your profiles, proxies, and groups across devices.

cloud.deviceLinkInstructions: Click "Login" to open the login page in your browser. Once signed in there, copy the code shown and paste it below.
cloud.linkCodePlaceholder: Paste the code from the website
cloud.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out? Cloud sync will stop.

team.title: Team
team.name: Team Name
team.manageOnWeb: Manage team on the web dashboard
team.cannotLaunchLocked: Cannot launch — profile is in use by {{email}}

integrations.title: Integrations

api.title: Local API
api.description: Enable the local API server for external integrations.

mcp.title: MCP Server
mcp.description: Enable the MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for AI assistant integrations.
mcp.addedToClaudeDesktop: Added to Claude Desktop. Restart Claude Desktop and enable the extension in Settings.
mcp.removedFromClaudeDesktop: Removed from Claude Desktop config. Please restart Claude Desktop.

integrations.apiEnableDescription: Allow managing profiles, groups, and proxies via REST API.
integrations.mcpEnableDescription: Allow AI assistants like Claude Desktop to control browsers.

import.title: Import Profile
import.description: Import an existing browser profile from your system.

fingerprint.randomizeDescription: Generate a new fingerprint each time the browser is launched.

os.title: Operating System
os.description: The operating system to emulate for fingerprint generation.

copy.title: Copy Cookies
copy.description: Select cookies to copy to other profiles.
copy.dialogDescription_one: Copy cookies from a source profile to {{count}} selected profile.
copy.dialogDescription_other: Copy cookies from a source profile to {{count}} selected profiles.
copy.sourcePlaceholder: Select a profile to copy cookies from
copy.replaceNote: Existing cookies with the same name and domain will be replaced. Other cookies will be kept.
copy.cannotCopyRunningOne: Cannot copy cookies: {{names}} is still running
copy.cannotCopyRunningMany: Cannot copy cookies: {{names}} are still running

management.importDescription: Import cookies from a Netscape or JSON format file.

management.noCookies: No cookies found in this profile

import.proFeature: Cookie import is a Pro feature

errors.invalidPort: Please enter a valid port number (1-65535)
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.unknownError: An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
errors.noProfilesForUrl: No profiles available. Please create a profile first before opening URLs.
errors.cannotDeleteRunningProfile: Cannot delete profile while browser is running. Please stop the browser first.
errors.cookieCopyUnsupportedBrowser: Cookie copy only works with Wayfern and Camoufox profiles
errors.setupExtensionListenersFailed: Failed to setup extension event listeners: {{error}}
errors.setupGroupListenersFailed: Failed to setup group event listeners: {{error}}
errors.setupProfileListenersFailed: Failed to setup profile event listeners: {{error}}
errors.setupProxyListenersFailed: Failed to setup proxy event listeners: {{error}}
errors.setupVpnListenersFailed: Failed to setup VPN event listeners: {{error}}

fingerprint.crossOsWarning: Spoofing fingerprint for a different operating system is less reliable because it is impossible to perfectly mimic all underlying components. Use with caution.
fingerprint.crossOsLimitations: Cross-OS fingerprinting has limitations. System-level APIs may still reflect your actual operating system, and some features may have degraded performance.
fingerprint.generateRandomOnLaunch: Generate random fingerprint on every launch
fingerprint.generateRandomDescription: When enabled, a new fingerprint will be generated each time the browser is launched.
fingerprint.generateRandomDescriptionAuto: When enabled, a new fingerprint will be generated each time the browser is launched. The generated fingerprint is saved for reference.
fingerprint.autoLocationDescription: Automatically configure location information based on proxy configuration or your connection if no proxy provided
fingerprint.editingDisabledRunning: Fingerprint editing is disabled because the profile is currently running. Stop the profile to make changes.
fingerprint.editingDisabledRandomized: Fingerprint editing is disabled because random fingerprint generation is enabled. Disable the option above to manually edit the fingerprint configuration.
fingerprint.advancedWarning: Warning: Only edit these parameters if you know what you're doing. Incorrect values may break websites, make them detect you, and lead to hard-to-debug bugs.
fingerprint.basicWarning: Warning: Only edit these parameters if you know what you're doing.
fingerprint.timezoneGeolocationDescription: These values override the browser's timezone and geolocation APIs.
fingerprint.canvasNoiseSeedDescription: This seed is used to generate a consistent but unique canvas fingerprint. Each profile should have a different seed.
fingerprint.canvasNoiseSeedPlaceholder: Enter a seed string for canvas fingerprint

warnings.windowResizeDescription: Changing browser window dimensions may increase the chance of website detection that browser information is spoofed.
warnings.windowResizeCamoufoxDescription: Camoufox locks the viewport to the spoofed screen dimensions for anti-fingerprinting. Resizing the window may cause cropped or grey areas. This is expected behavior.

syncAll.title: Enable Sync for Existing Items
syncAll.description: You have items that are not being synced. Would you like to enable sync for all of them?

crossOs.viewOnly: This profile was created on {{os}} and is not supported on this system
crossOs.cannotLaunch: This profile was created on {{os}} and is not supported on this system
crossOs.cannotModify: Cannot modify sync settings for a cross-OS profile

network.bypassRulesDescription: Requests matching these rules will connect directly, bypassing the proxy.
network.ruleTypes: Supports hostnames, IP addresses, and regex patterns.

launchHook.title: Launch Hook URL

launchHook.description: Donut Browser will POST to this URL whenever the profile is launched.

extensions.description: Manage browser extensions and extension groups for your profiles.

dnsBlocklist.settingsDescription: DNS blocklists block ads, trackers, and malware domains at the proxy level. Lists are automatically refreshed every 12 hours.

locationProxy.description: Choose a country to route this profile through. A proxy will be created automatically.

launchOnLogin.title: Enable Launch on Login?
launchOnLogin.description: Running in the background helps keep your proxies and browsers alive.

wayfernTerms.title: Wayfern Terms and Conditions
wayfernTerms.description: Before using Donut Browser, you must read and agree to Wayfern's Terms and Conditions.
wayfernTerms.reviewLabel: Please review the Terms and Conditions at:
wayfernTerms.agreeNotice: By clicking "I Accept", you agree to be bound by these terms.

commercialTrial.title: Commercial Trial Expired
commercialTrial.description: Your 2-week commercial trial period has ended.
commercialTrial.body: If you are using Donut Browser for business purposes, you need to purchase a commercial license to continue. You can still use it for personal use for free.

permissionDialog.descMicrophone: Donut Browser needs access to your microphone to enable microphone functionality in web browsers. Each website that wants to use your microphone will still ask for your permission individually.
permissionDialog.descCamera: Donut Browser needs access to your camera to enable camera functionality in web browsers. Each website that wants to use your camera will still ask for your permission individually.
permissionDialog.grantedMicrophone: Permission granted! Browsers launched from Donut Browser can now access your microphone.
permissionDialog.grantedCamera: Permission granted! Browsers launched from Donut Browser can now access your camera.
permissionDialog.notGrantedMicrophone: Permission not granted. Click the button below to request access to your microphone.
permissionDialog.notGrantedCamera: Permission not granted. Click the button below to request access to your camera.

traffic.title: Traffic Details
traffic.proxyDisclaimer: Note: If you are using a proxy, VPN, or similar service, your provider may calculate traffic differently due to encryption overhead and protocol differences.
traffic.noData: No traffic data available for this profile.
traffic.noDataHint: Traffic data will appear after you launch the profile.

camoufoxDialog.invalidFingerprintDescription: The fingerprint configuration contains invalid JSON. Please check your advanced settings.

toast.extractionFailedDescription: The corrupt file was deleted. It will be re-downloaded on next attempt.

toast.singleProfileUpdated: Profile "{{name}}" has been updated to version {{version}}. You can now launch your browsers with the latest version.
toast.multipleProfilesUpdated: {{count}} profiles have been updated to version {{version}}. You can now launch your browsers with the latest version.
toast.versionAvailable: Version {{version}} is now available. Running profiles will use the new version when restarted.
toast.updateWithErrorsDescription: {{newVersions}} new versions found, {{failedUpdates}} browsers failed to update
toast.updateSuccessDescription: Found {{newVersions}} new versions across {{successfulUpdates}} browsers. Auto-downloads will start shortly.
toast.upToDateDescription: All browser versions are up to date
